productName: Honey Stixx - Flavored - Twisted Peach - Hybrid
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Peach flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a soft, juicy peach flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
